items.claim: Paddy Pimblett lacks offensive wrestling ability.
items.quote: He doesn't have any like offensive wrestling.

items.claim: Paddy Pimblett's striking skills are average for the weight class.
items.quote: on the the feet, he's his hands are pretty average for that weight class.

items.claim: Benoit Saint Denis possesses significant knockout power.
items.quote: just because how how hard he hits.

items.claim: Paddy Pimblett sustained significant damage in his recent fight against Justin Gaethje.
items.quote: Paddy Pimblett did take a lot of damage in his fight with Justin Gaethje

items.claim: Benoit Saint Denis holds a technical advantage in striking.
items.quote: I think he's going to be uh able to have a technical advantage for sure there.

items.claim: Paddy Pimblett has a tendency to accept bottom position during grappling exchanges.
items.quote: I feel like Paddy has a little bit of a tendency to sometimes accept bottom position

items.claim: Benoit Saint Denis thrives in chaotic fight environments.
items.quote: I think that BSD can create the chaos, and a lot of the time he thrives in that.
